about.title: About
about.description: We are not just a software company, we are your partners in digital success. We combine deep technical expertise with creative design to build systems that last.
about.vision_desc: To be the primary reference in the Arab world for professional web system development and to contribute to the comprehensive digital transformation of institutions and companies of all sizes.
about.mission_desc: To provide innovative, secure, and easy-to-use technical solutions that enable entrepreneurs to manage their projects with intelligence and high efficiency, while ensuring the best continuous technical support.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our systems and services

items.question: How can I order a product or service?
items.answer: You can order products and services by contacting us directly through our Contact page, and we will schedule a meeting to discuss your requirements and project details.

items.question: What payment methods are available?
items.answer: We offer several payment methods for software projects: bank transfer, and electronic transfer. Payments are agreed upon based on project milestones.

items.question: Do you provide a warranty on software products?
items.answer: Yes, we provide a warranty and technical support for all systems and websites after delivery to ensure they work perfectly.

items.question: How can I track the progress of my project?
items.answer: We assign a dedicated project manager as your direct point of contact, who will provide you with regular reports on the progress of your project.

items.question: How can I contact you?
items.answer: You can contact us by phone, email: info@softycode.com, or through the contact form on our contact page.

items.question: Do you provide technical support services?
items.answer: Yes, we provide continuous technical support to ensure the stability of the systems and websites we develop and to resolve any issues you may encounter.

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: We offer a comprehensive range of services: web system development, mobile applications, technical consulting, interface design, cloud maintenance, and digital security.

faq.contact_cta: Didn't find your answer? Contact us

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: Please read the terms and conditions before using our products and services
terms.acceptance: By visiting our website and using our products and services, you acknowledge that you have read these terms and agree to abide by them. If you do not agree to any of these terms, please do not use our products and services.
terms.use: Our products and services should be used only for lawful purposes and for the purposes for which they were designed. Use of our products and services for any illegal or unethical purpose is not permitted.
terms.intellectual: All rights related to our products and services are reserved to us. Use, copying, distribution, or modification of our products and services without written permission from us is not permitted.
terms.warranty: We provide a 30-day warranty on all our products and services. If you encounter any problem, you can request a refund or replacement within this period. See the detailed refund policy.
terms.limitation: We are not responsible for any damages resulting from the use of our products and services. You must verify the validity of the products and services before use.
terms.privacy_link: We are committed to protecting your privacy. Review the detailed privacy policy to know how we collect and use your data.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At SoftyCode, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect and use your personal information. Please read this policy carefully before using our products and services.

footer.description: Your ideal technical partner for building smart cloud solutions with a soft touch. We transform programming complexities into easy and effective systems that support your future vision.
footer.newsletter_desc: Subscribe to receive our latest news and exclusive offers

free_trial.title: Welcome Gift! 🎁
free_trial.description: Enjoy a full trial of all system features <1>free for one full month</1>. Discover how SoftyCode can transform your business.
free_trial.terms: * This offer is valid once for new subscribers only
free_trial.success_desc: Congratulations! You can now start using all system features for free for 30 days.
free_trial.error: An error occurred while activating the free trial. Please try again.

sections.s1_body: We collect personal information you voluntarily provide when registering for our services, such as name, email, and phone number. We may also collect non-personal information such as browser type and device for service improvement purposes.
sections.s2_body: We use the information we collect to provide and improve our services, communicate with you about updates and marketing offers (with your consent), and analyze platform usage to enhance user experience.
sections.s3_body: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include encryption, firewalls, and intrusion detection systems.
sections.s4_body: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes without your explicit consent. We may share information with trusted service providers who assist in operating our platform, subject to confidentiality obligations.
sections.s5_body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You may also object to or request restriction of processing. You can exercise these rights by contacting us through our Contact page.
sections.s6_body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes via email or notice on our platform. We recommend reviewing this page periodically.

sections.s1_body: By using our platform and services, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must cease using our services immediately.
sections.s2_body: Our services must be used only for lawful purposes and in accordance with applicable laws and regulations. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information and password.
sections.s3_body: All content, trademarks, software, and designs available on our platform are the property of SoftyCode and are protected by intellectual property laws. No content may be copied, distributed, or modified without written permission.
sections.s4_body: We provide a 30-day warranty on all our products and services. If you encounter any issue, you may request a refund or replacement within this period in accordance with our refund policy.
sections.s5_body: To the extent permitted by law, SoftyCode shall not be liable for any indirect or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use our services.
sections.s6_body: These terms and conditions are governed by the laws and regulations of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Any dispute arising from these terms shall be subject to the jurisdiction of Saudi courts.
sections.s7_body: We are committed to protecting your privacy. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
